title: PaymentAction: address, tx_hash, reason are unbounded strings
description: PaymentAction::Address.address, Sent.tx_hash, Unknown.reason, and Cancelled.reason are all bare String fields with no serde length guard. PaymentAction travels inside MLS-encrypted payloads, so any MLS peer can trigger this. Trigger: send PaymentAction::Address with address set to a multi-MiB string. Bad outcome: unbounded heap allocation in the receiver before any application-layer check runs. Confirmed.tx_hash is also unguarded.
